title: Undefined server name in IR-to-FDR conversion
problemSignature: IR-to-FDR converter encountered undefined server name at endpoint; server URL mapping product bug.
rationale: Undefined endpoint server references come from user-authored API environment configuration and should surface as validation errors at the IR-to-FDR boundary, not as reportable internal conversion failures.
fixSummary: Reclassified undefined REST endpoint server references in IR-to-FDR conversion as non-reportable validation errors.
